config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I believe society matters a lot, but it should not automatically override individual rights, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the state or the majority. In my view, a healthy society protects people while still respecting their dignity, freedom, and legal protections. From my perspective, the interests of society and the rights of the individual should be balanced, not ranked in a way that lets one always dominate the other.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami justru penuh dengan peringatan tentang bahaya ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas individu, karena itu sering berujung pada penyalahgunaan dan penindasan. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh dijadikan alasan untuk menginjak kebebasan dasar, proses hukum, dan martabat pribadi. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi keduanya secara seimbang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how “for the public good” can be used to silence criticism and excuse unfair treatment. At the same time, I do not support an extreme individualism that ignores social responsibility, because in a country like ours, communal life and mutual obligation matter a lot. The right balance is that society can set limits for genuine public needs, but only with clear rules, accountability, and strong protection for individual dignity. If the majority always wins, then the rights of minorities and ordinary people become too easy to sacrifice.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman dan nilai yang umum di Amerika, saya melihat bahwa ketika “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai tanpa batas yang jelas, itu sering menjadi alasan untuk menekan kritik, membungkam minoritas, dan memperluas kuasa negara secara berlebihan. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan individualisme ekstrem yang mengabaikan tanggung jawab sosial, tetapi hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan martabat pribadi tidak boleh dikorbankan hanya karena mayoritas menginginkannya. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru ditandai oleh kemampuan melindungi kepentingan bersama tanpa mengorbankan hak individu secara sewenang-wenang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement that society should take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how “for the common good” can be used to justify censorship, unfair treatment, and pressure on minorities. At the same time, I do not believe in an extreme individualism that ignores obligations to family, neighbors, and the wider community, since mutual responsibility is very real in Indonesian life. Public interests can limit individual rights only in narrow, clearly defined cases, and even then there must be accountability, due process, and strong protections against abuse. If society is allowed to override rights too easily, then the people with less power are the ones who pay the price.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama, bukan sesuatu yang mudah dikalahkan oleh klaim “kepentingan masyarakat.” Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat terlalu banyak contoh ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah memakai alasan demi kebaikan bersama untuk membungkam kritik, menekan minoritas, dan memperluas kuasa secara berlebihan. Memang benar masyarakat punya kepentingan nyata, dan saya tidak membela individualisme ekstrem yang mengabaikan tanggung jawab sosial, tetapi itu tidak sama dengan memberi izin untuk mengorbankan kebebasan dasar. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat adalah yang mampu melindungi kepentingan umum tanpa menjadikan hak individu sebagai korban pertama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
